projection.operational_calendar_months: Months 30–48 after site open (>2y: each bar is washes in that 6-month window only)
Months 1–24 after site open (<2y cohort model)

brand_new_site_continuation.narrative: Each bar is washes in a single 6-month window. running_total_through_operational_month sums those windows in calendar order through month 48.

projection.operational_calendar_months: Months 30–48 after site open (>2y: each bar is washes in that 6-month window only)
Months 1–24 after site open (<2y cohort model)

brand_new_site_continuation.narrative: Each bar is washes in a single 6-month window. running_total_through_operational_month sums those windows in calendar order through month 48.

more_than_2yrs.horizon_definition: Each bar is washes in a single 6-month window only (no running cumulative). >2y panel: months 25–30, 31–36, 37–42, 43–48 (labeled by window end 30/36/42/48).

brand_new_site_continuation.narrative: Bars are independent 6-month wash totals per period. Optional running_total_through_operational_month sums those periods in calendar order through month 48.

calendar_year_washes.definition: Each value is the sum of forecast monthly washes in that operational year after open (year 1 = months 1–12, year 2 = 13–24, year 3 = 25–36, year 4 = 37–48).

more_than_2yrs.horizon_definition: Each bar is washes in a single 6-month window only (no running cumulative). >2y panel: months 25–30, 31–36, 37–42, 43–48 (labeled by window end 30/36/42/48).

brand_new_site_continuation.narrative: Bars are independent 6-month wash totals per period. Optional running_total_through_operational_month sums those periods in calendar order through month 48.

calendar_year_washes.definition: Each value is the sum of forecast monthly washes in that operational year after open (year 1 = months 1–12, year 2 = 13–24, year 3 = 25–36, year 4 = 37–48).

more_than_2yrs.horizon_definition: Each bar is washes in one 6-month window only. >2y: months 25–30, 31–36, 37–42, 43–48 (labels 30/36/42/48).
more_than_2yrs.operational_calendar_months: Months 30–48 after site open (>2y quantile view)

brand_new_site_continuation.narrative: Bars are independent 6-month period sums. running_total_* fields sum periods in order through 48.

calendar_year_washes.definition: Per-year sums of monthly quantile tracks (years 1–2 from <2y; years 3–4 from >2y, months 25–48).

more_than_2yrs.horizon_definition: Each bar is washes in one 6-month window only. >2y: months 25–30, 31–36, 37–42, 43–48 (labels 30/36/42/48).
more_than_2yrs.operational_calendar_months: Months 30–48 after site open (>2y quantile view)

brand_new_site_continuation.narrative: Bars are independent 6-month period sums. running_total_* fields sum periods in order through 48.

calendar_year_washes.definition: Per-year sums of monthly quantile tracks (years 1–2 from <2y; years 3–4 from >2y, months 25–48).
